title: Wangzhe Da Shixiong
synopsis:
After arriving on the Xuanlong Continent, Jiang Beiran experienced the harsh realities of human relationships and gradually figured out the rules of survival in this world. He was later accepted into the Guixin Sect. Within the sect, he appeared to be a low-key disciple devoted to Go, but in reality, he was proficient in all the arts—music, chess, calligraphy, and painting—and skilled in both literature and martial arts. Secretly, he helped the sect discover and cultivate a group of outstanding disciples, embarking on his quiet path to becoming a powerful figure in the world of cultivation…

(Source: Tencent, translated)
